sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتِ الجَدَّةُ حَفِيدَهَا نُقُودًا فِي العِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Baka je unuku dala novac za bajram.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother gave her grandchild money for the holiday.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الطِّفْلُ كَثِيرًا وَقَبَّلَ يَدَ جَدَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete se jako obradovalo i poljubilo bakin ruku.
sentences.translationEn: The child was very happy and kissed his grandmother's hand.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْهُ أُمُّهُ: مَاذَا سَتَفْعَلُ بِهَذِهِ النُّقُودِ؟
sentences.translation: Majka ga je pitala: Šta ćeš uraditi s ovim novcem?
sentences.translationEn: His mother asked him: What will you do with this money?

sentences.translation: Rekao je: Kupit ću knjigu a ostatak ću uštedjeti.
sentences.translationEn: He said: I will buy a book and save the rest.
